title: paspalum tuberosum
intro: Paspalum tuberosum, also known as Pigeon Grass or Elephant's Grass, is a perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paspalum tuberosum include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory problems like bronchitis. Paspalum tuberosum is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
